design_philosophy: Premium, modern, minimalistic, and highly professional user experience with a luxurious resort feel. The design must emphasize emotional connection, relaxation, and exclusivity through generous whitespace, high-contrast elegant typography, and carefully curated imagery.

forbidden_elements: Overly dense layouts without breathing room

typography.instructions: Import 'El Messiri' and 'Tajawal' from Google Fonts. Maintain generous line height for Arabic readability. Use font-light for elegance and font-bold strategically for contrast.

grid_system.dashboard: Dense Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6)

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, border-b border-white/20) for sticky headers over images. Solid background when not overlapping.
surface_strategies.cards: Flat solid backgrounds with very subtle borders (border-border/40). No heavy drop shadows. Use slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg on hover for interactive cards.

components.buttons: Primary buttons should use the Deep Forest color (#1A362D) with Gold/White text, rounded-md, px-8 py-3. Hover states must be explicitly defined (hover:bg-[#132720]).
components.inputs: Shadcn UI inputs heavily customized to remove the 'default SaaS' look. Use subtle borders, larger padding, and tailored focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C6A87C]).
components.booking_widget: Sticky on desktop chalet pages. High contrast, clear calls to action, prominent price display.
components.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive and key informational elements (e.g., data-testid='booking-submit-btn').

motion.general: Minimalist and slow. Use Framer Motion for fade-up on scroll (y: 20, opacity: 0).
motion.hover: Smooth color and subtle transform transitions (duration-300 ease-out).

media.instructions: Use full-width cinematic hero visuals with maximum overlay opacity of bg-black/40. The imagery must feel expensive and aspirational.

image_urls.description: Modern luxury exterior architecture, good for main hero section.
Charming wooden cabin illuminated at night.
Charming stone villa with pool in mountains.
Peaceful mountain retreat featuring a cozy cabin, swimming pool.

icons.style: Minimalistic, stroke-width 1.5, avoiding filled icons to maintain an elegant and light aesthetic.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly implement RTL layout by adding dir='rtl' to the HTML tag and setting the lang to 'ar'.
Ensure Tailwind configuration includes the custom fonts and color palette defined here.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000) for text; use the defined text_primary (#0F172A).
All navigation and form labels must be translated to Arabic.
Incorporate data-testid attributes into all interactive components for testability.
The UI should feel calm, luxurious, and spacious. Do not clutter the screen with excessive widgets.
